dedup_check.method: grep -F against 选题历史.md, 90-day window
excluded_judgment_call: Graphify-Labs/graphify — WebFetch confirmed github.com/safishamsi/graphify now resolves to Graphify-Labs/graphify with identical description/purpose (same project, transferred from personal account to an org). Same underlying project already covered on 2026-07-12 as safishamsi/graphify. Excluded to honor dedup intent despite the owner/name string not matching exactly.

borderline_excluded.reason: 'AI' appears only as one of three listed platform types (analytics/AI/BI) in a metadata-standardization spec; core subject is not an AI tool. Topics are only 'metadata, semantic', no AI topic. Judged not genuinely AI-relevant despite a marginal keyword hit.
description hits 'agent' (+2) but no topics shown and repo name has no ai/llm/gpt/claude/agent substring — only one signal type, below the '≥2 signal types' bar.

fill_logic: Only 2 AI-qualified candidates after dedup, so filled the 3rd slot with the highest today's-stars non-AI/non-excluded repo per 配置.yaml fill_with_non_ai_if_insufficient=true.

fill_candidates_ranked_by_stars_today.reason: generic programming tutorial list, no fresh news angle
sparse description ('Bonsai Demo'), low information density

api_note: api.github.com curl calls returned 403 'GitHub access to this repository is not enabled for this session' for all repos outside the session's mounted source — used WebFetch tool instead for both trending list and per-repo metadata/README (server-side fetch, bypasses local sandbox proxy scoping).
